task_completion.description: Load the Landsat multispectral image into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'landsat_multispectral.tif' is visible in the application's product tree, file explorer, or main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Modified Bare Soil Index (BSI) using the correct band formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths or raster calculation dialog showing the creation of a new band named 'bsi' with the expression '((band_1 + band_3) - (band_2 + band_4)) / ((band_1 + band_3) + (band_2 + band_4))' (or mathematically equivalent).

task_completion.description: Create a binary high-risk soil mask for pixels where BSI is greater than 0.10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths or raster calculation dialog showing the creation of a new band named 'high_erosion_risk' with an expression like 'bsi > 0.1' or 'bsi > 0.10' (or an IF/THEN statement achieving the same binary result).

task_completion.description: Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog or file manager showing the file 'erosion_risk.dim' being saved to the '~/snap_exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting product as a GeoTIFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file manager showing the file 'erosion_risk.tif' being saved to the '~/snap_exports/' directory with GeoTIFF format selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the remote sensing software (e.g., SNAP) to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the application's GUI windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than just executing terminal commands or writing Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the formulas into the application's calculator.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Band Maths or expression builder dialogs are visibly open with the required mathematical expressions typed in, rather than the agent just renaming existing files or using a text editor to fake outputs.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's native save/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application's native 'Save' or 'Export' dialog windows are visible, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' being used to create dummy output files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Expected output files: /home/ga/snap_exports/erosion_risk.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/erosion_risk.tif. The BSI formula must map to: ((band_1 + band_3) - (band_2 + band_4)) / ((band_1 + band_3) + (band_2 + band_4)). The high erosion risk mask must use the threshold > 0.1. The final product should contain 6 bands: band_1, band_2, band_3, band_4, bsi, and high_erosion_risk.
